sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29590" key="du/sfqegktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσ-φθεγκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unfit to be uttered</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.129</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.123</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
